statusDefinitions.approved-source: May be used as source material for a public submission asset.
statusDefinitions.conditional: Must be sanitized, renamed, cropped, or regenerated before public use.
statusDefinitions.exclude: Keep only as internal history or reference; do not package or publish.

approvedSources.requiredAction: Export public copies under an original product-neutral name.
Retain WebP optimization and record the source PNG relationship.
Use only if a light comparison panel is needed.

approvedSources.role: selected runtime member of the original foreground hero character family
approvedSources.provenance: Original character generated with Image2 from the user's prompt and selected from generated variants; no third-party character image was copied into the asset.
approvedSources.requiredAction: Choose the best generated variant for each layout, retain generation provenance, and use generic original cyber-mecha terminology in public copy.

approvedSources.role: alternate original Image2-generated cyber cat character family
approvedSources.provenance: Original alternate character family generated with Image2 during the same project design workflow.
approvedSources.requiredAction: Keep as an alternate composition source; do not mix multiple hero variants into one crowded submission image.

approvedSources.role: original semantic cat and pet control glyphs
approvedSources.requiredAction: Keep the existing abstract icon treatment and action mapping.

approvedSources.provenance: Generated from the user-provided orange hacker cat project reference, then processed locally into transparent runtime badge sizes.
approvedSources.requiredAction: Use only as a contained sidebar badge and retain this provenance note in public copy.

approvedSources.provenance: Project-specific 2D orange-cat table-flip animation asset produced and locally regenerated during the Dream Skin workflow; transparent GIF, WebP, poster, and sprite variants were generated for runtime testing.
approvedSources.requiredAction: Use generic table-flip wording; do not reference external meme names or third-party artwork in public copy.

conditionalSources.risk: Contains a personal account name, private task names, development conversation text, and local artifact names.
conditionalSources.requiredAction: Capture a staged demo project or redact all private content before publication.

conditionalSources.risk: Contains live development content and identity markers.
conditionalSources.requiredAction: Use only after a clean-room recapture or complete sanitization.

conditionalSources.role: left navigation and character detail source
conditionalSources.risk: Contains live task labels and account identity.
conditionalSources.requiredAction: Crop to the designed module and replace private labels with a demo fixture.

conditionalSources.risk: Contains local screenshot names and live workspace content.
conditionalSources.requiredAction: Recapture the panel using neutral sample source names.

excludedSources.reason: Legacy reference-only experiment with third-party branded wording in the original prompt.
This is regression evidence, not a stable product demo.

submissionVisuals.sourcePlan: Use the approved contrast-city background and the original Image2-generated cyber-mecha cat hero.
Use the clean storyboard comparison for public explanation and capture live Codex only from a neutral demo workspace.
Recapture the final composition with neutral tasks, neutral files, and no personal identity.
Render the existing unified state machine and runtime module boundaries as a competition diagram.
Visualize payload budget, WebP reduction, static cache behavior, manual animation lifecycle, and restore gate.
